# Gaussian Input Fixture Provenance

These fixtures are small public Gaussian input examples copied verbatim for
parse-focused regression tests. They are not used as computational reference
data and no Gaussian output files are included.

Retrieved: 2026-06-09

| Local file | Upstream source | License |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `cctk_tutorial1.gjf` | `ekwan/cctk` tutorial file [`tutorial/tutorial_01/tutorial1.gjf`](https://github.com/ekwan/cctk/blob/45d638462047cbe22be2f88422b8821cb481d877/tutorial/tutorial_01/tutorial1.gjf) | Apache-2.0 |
| `cctk_starting_structure.gjf` | `ekwan/cctk` tutorial file [`tutorial/tutorial_05/starting_structure.gjf`](https://github.com/ekwan/cctk/blob/45d638462047cbe22be2f88422b8821cb481d877/tutorial/tutorial_05/starting_structure.gjf) | Apache-2.0 |
| `openqc_water_opt.com` | `newtontech/OpenQC-VSCode` example file [`examples/gaussian/water_opt.com`](https://github.com/newtontech/OpenQC-VSCode/blob/cdeabf1c1945a65f73f24747257a2b0d8e86b309/examples/gaussian/water_opt.com) | MIT |
| `qubekit_gaussian_gas_example.com` | `qubekit/QUBEKit` example data file [`qubekit/data/gaussian_gas_example.com`](https://github.com/qubekit/QUBEKit/blob/bdccc28d1ad8c0fb4eeb01467bfe8365396c411c/qubekit/data/gaussian_gas_example.com) | MIT |
